Moreover, the note "[MUTATED from select_row]" indicates the intended operation was to select rows (e.g., for Bryan McLeod), for which f_select_row should have been used. This is a misuse of the specified functions and does not align with the task of isolating the relevant row. Step 1 is incorrect.
